历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17778 → 33609 → 23491 → 26935 → 24393. In 2022, it significantly dropped to 33609, rebounded to 23491 in 2023, and fluctuated between 23491 and 26935 in the past three years. The 2025 baseline is about 24393. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 46 in 2025, showing an initial expansion followed by contraction. The 2026 plan is 45, a decrease of 1 (-2.2%) from 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking rose from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing appeal to science and engineering candidates. Ethnology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, strong in humanities and social sciences, but science and engineering disciplines not rated A-class, limiting appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 102737 in 2021, 135352 in 2022, 141322 in 2023, 149645 in 2024, and 143368 in 2025, showing an overall increasing trend. In 2026, total candidates are about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 142,800 (based on recent proportion of about 71.4%), a slight decrease from 2025, easing competition slightly. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 336 in 2021, 362 in 2022, 360 in 2023, 368 in 2024, and 367 in 2025, remaining stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 24,393, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-2.2%), continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, the enrollment reduction shifts the ranking forward (easier to enter), but the rising university ranking and overall application heat partially offset this. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 24,095, with a range of 23,595 to 24,595.
